articles.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI窃取硬件商业机密，指控通过挖角获取芯片设计机密
articles.title_en: Apple Sues OpenAI for Stealing Hardware Trade Secrets via Employee Poaching
articles.summary: 苹果公司正式起诉OpenAI，指控其通过系统性地挖角苹果员工，非法获取硬件商业机密，涉及芯片设计和消费硬件领域的核心技术情报。
articles.summary_en: Apple has filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of improperly acquiring hardware trade secrets through the systematic recruitment of former Apple employees, covering chip design and consumer hardware development.
articles.content: 7月21日，苹果公司正式向联邦法院提起诉讼，指控OpenAI通过有组织地招募前苹果员工，非法获取硬件商业机密，涵盖芯片设计、散热架构和消费硬件等核心技术领域。诉讼称，OpenAI在2024年至2026年间至少挖角了40余名苹果硬件工程师，其中多人掌握关键芯片设计机密。OpenAI否认全部指控，称这些员工带来的仅是公开领域知识和个人技能。此案可能影响OpenAI的消费硬件计划，并推迟其自研AI芯片的研发进度。
articles.content_en: On July 21, Apple filed a federal lawsuit accusing OpenAI of systematically poaching former Apple employees to acquire hardware trade secrets, including chip design, thermal architecture, and consumer hardware blueprints. The lawsuit claims OpenAI recruited at least 40+ Apple hardware engineers between 2024-2026, many with access to critical chip design secrets. OpenAI denies all allegations, stating employees brought only public knowledge and personal skills. The case could complicate OpenAI's consumer hardware ambitions and delay its in-house AI chip development.
key_points: 苹果起诉OpenAI挖角窃取芯片设计机密
涉及40余名前苹果硬件工程师
可能影响OpenAI自研芯片和消费硬件计划
key_points_en: Apple sues OpenAI over chip design trade secret theft
Involves 40+ former Apple hardware engineers
Could delay OpenAI's custom chip and hardware plans

articles.title: 欧盟发布AI网络安全新规：先进AI模型上市前须通过强制安全评估
articles.title_en: EU Unveils New AI Cybersecurity Rules: Mandatory Safety Assessments Before Market Entry
articles.summary: 欧盟委员会发布新规，要求所有先进AI模型在进入欧洲市场前接受严格安全评估，同时建立安全测试平台和专项评估能力，以防范针对关键基础设施的网络攻击。
articles.summary_en: The European Commission unveiled new rules requiring advanced AI models to undergo rigorous security evaluations before entering the European market, alongside a secure testing platform for critical infrastructure protection.
articles.content: 欧盟委员会7月21日正式发布新的AI网络安全框架，要求所有先进AI模型在进入欧洲市场前必须通过强制性的安全评估。新规还要求建立统一的安全测试平台，并设立专门的评估能力，以强化针对关键基础设施的网络攻击防御。该框架是欧盟AI法案的补充，重点针对具备潜在双重用途风险的AI系统。违反规定的企业将面临最高全球年营收6%的罚款。
articles.content_en: The European Commission on July 21 unveiled a new AI cybersecurity framework requiring all advanced AI models to pass mandatory security evaluations before entering the European market. The rules also mandate a unified secure testing platform and dedicated assessment capabilities to strengthen defenses against cyberattacks on critical infrastructure. The framework complements the EU AI Act, targeting AI systems with potential dual-use risks. Violators face fines of up to 6% of global annual revenue.
key_points: 欧盟新规要求先进AI模型上市前强制安全评估
建立统一安全测试平台
违规罚款最高全球年营收6%
key_points_en: Mandatory AI security assessments before EU market entry
Unified secure testing platform established
Fines up to 6% of global annual revenue

articles.title: 苹果智能获准入华：基于阿里千问的本地化方案获批，百度提供补充能力
articles.title_en: Apple Intelligence Approved for China Launch: Localized with Alibaba's Qwen, Baidu to Supply Additional Capabilities
articles.summary: Apple Intelligence在华部署方案获得监管批准，基于阿里巴巴千问大模型的本地化版本已经就绪，百度将提供额外的AI能力补充。这是苹果AI首次进入中国这个最重要的海外市场之一。
articles.summary_en: Apple Intelligence has received regulatory approval for deployment in mainland China, featuring a localized version built around Alibaba's Qwen model, with Baidu providing additional AI capabilities. This marks Apple AI's first entry into one of its most important overseas markets.
articles.content: 据多方消息确认，Apple Intelligence已获得中国监管机构批准，将在华部署基于阿里巴巴千问大模型(Qwen)的本地化AI方案。百度也将为苹果提供额外的AI能力支持。这一获批标志着苹果AI能力首次进入中国市场，对中国用户而言，Siri将获得本地化的智能助手体验。此前由于中国严格的AI监管法规，Apple Intelligence在全球发布后一直未在中国大陆上线。
articles.content_en: Apple Intelligence has received regulatory approval from Chinese authorities for deployment in mainland China, featuring a localized AI solution built around Alibaba's Qwen large language model. Baidu will also provide additional AI capabilities. This marks Apple AI's first entry into the Chinese market, offering Chinese users a localized Siri experience. Apple Intelligence had been unavailable in mainland China since its global launch due to strict AI regulations.
key_points: Apple Intelligence获中国监管批准入华
基于阿里千问Qwen大模型本地化
百度将提供补充AI能力
key_points_en: Apple Intelligence approved for China launch
Localized with Alibaba's Qwen model
Baidu to supply additional AI capabilities

articles.title: 台积电Q2财报超预期，再宣布千亿美元赴美投资计划
articles.title_en: TSMC Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Announces Another $100B US Investment
articles.summary: 台积电公布超预期的第二季度财报，AI芯片需求强劲拉动增长。同时宣布追加1000亿美元美国投资计划，使在美总投资额达到约2650亿美元。
articles.summary_en: TSMC reported sharply higher Q2 earnings driven by surging AI chip demand, while announcing an additional $100 billion in planned US investment, bringing its total American commitment to roughly $265 billion.
articles.content: 台积电7月21日公布第二季度财报，营收和利润均超市场预期，主要受AI芯片需求的强劲拉动。公司同时宣布再追加1000亿美元的在美投资计划，使其在美国的总投资额达到约2650亿美元。这笔投资将用于建设先进的3纳米和2纳米晶圆厂。台积电董事长刘德音表示，全球AI算力需求仍处于爆发初期，公司对未来5年的增长前景保持乐观。
articles.content_en: TSMC reported Q2 earnings on July 21 that beat market expectations, driven by surging AI chip demand. The company announced an additional $100 billion investment in the US, bringing its total American commitment to approximately $265 billion. The investment will fund advanced 3nm and 2nm wafer fabs. TSMC Chairman Mark Liu stated that global AI computing demand remains in its early explosive phase, and the company is optimistic about growth over the next five years.
key_points: 台积电Q2财报超预期，AI芯片需求驱动
追加1000亿美元在美投资
总投资额达2650亿美元
key_points_en: TSMC Q2 earnings beat estimates on AI chip demand
Additional $100B US investment announced
Total US commitment reaches $265B

articles.title: 欧盟DMA要求谷歌向竞争对手AI助手开放Android核心功能
articles.title_en: EU DMA Requires Google to Open Android Core Features to Competing AI Assistants
articles.summary: 根据欧盟数字市场法案，谷歌将被要求向竞争对手的AI助手提供与Android关键功能的同等访问权限，以防止Gemini成为Android设备上永久偏好的AI助手。
articles.summary_en: Under the EU Digital Markets Act, Google will be required to provide competing AI assistants with comparable access to key Android capabilities, preventing Gemini from becoming the permanently preferred assistant on Android devices.
articles.content: 欧盟委员会根据数字市场法案(DMA)正式裁定，谷歌必须向第三方AI助手开放Android系统的关键功能接口，包括语音唤醒、默认助手设置和设备权限等。这一决定旨在防止Gemini凭借Android系统的默认地位获得不公平竞争优势。谷歌表示将遵守裁决但可能提出上诉。这一决定将深刻影响欧洲AI助手市场的竞争格局。
articles.content_en: The European Commission has ruled under the Digital Markets Act that Google must open key Android system interfaces to third-party AI assistants, including voice wake-up, default assistant settings, and device permissions. The decision aims to prevent Gemini from gaining unfair advantage through Android's default status. Google stated it will comply but may appeal. The ruling will profoundly reshape the European AI assistant market landscape.
key_points: 欧盟DMA裁定谷歌开放Android给第三方AI助手
防止Gemini获得默认优势
涵盖语音唤醒、默认助手设置等
key_points_en: EU DMA rules Google must open Android to rival AI assistants
Prevents Gemini from gaining default advantage
Covers voice wake-up, default assistant settings

articles.title: 美国考虑限制中国先进开源AI模型，月之暗面Kimi K3可能被禁
articles.title_en: US Considers Ban on Advanced Chinese Open-Source AI Models, Kimi K3 at Risk
articles.summary: 美国政府正在评估对Moonshot的Kimi K3等中国先进开源AI模型实施限制措施，担心低成本开源竞争威胁美国AI公司的盈利能力。
articles.summary_en: The US government is evaluating potential restrictions on advanced Chinese open-weight AI models like Moonshot's Kimi K3, concerned that low-cost open-source competition could threaten domestic AI companies' profitability.
articles.content: 据知情人士透露，美国政府正在评估对月之暗面(Moonshot AI)的Kimi K3等中国先进开源AI模型实施出口限制的可能性。Kimi K3拥有2.8万亿参数，是目前全球最大的开源模型，其性能接近闭源旗舰模型。美国国内AI公司担忧，中国开源模型的低成本竞争将严重侵蚀其利润率。该评估尚处于早期阶段，但已引发开源社区的广泛关注和争议。
articles.content_en: The US government is evaluating potential export restrictions on advanced Chinese open-weight AI models such as Moonshot's Kimi K3, sources familiar with the matter revealed. With 2.8 trillion parameters, Kimi K3 is the world's largest open-source model, approaching the performance of closed-source flagship models. US AI companies fear that low-cost Chinese open-source competition could severely impact their profit margins. The evaluation is in early stages but has sparked widespread concern in the open-source community.
key_points: 美国评估限制中国开源AI模型
月之暗面Kimi K3可能被列入限制范围
开源社区对此广泛关注
key_points_en: US evaluates restrictions on Chinese open-source AI models
Moonshot's Kimi K3 could be restricted
Open-source community widely concerned

articles.title: 月之暗面寻求投资者批准，推进香港IPO计划
articles.title_en: Moonshot AI Seeks Investor Approval to List in Hong Kong
articles.summary: 月之暗面(Moonshot AI)已要求投资者为香港IPO扫清障碍。这家北京AI初创公司旗下Kimi K3大模型近期引发全球关注，IPO估值可能超过300亿美元。
articles.summary_en: Moonshot AI has asked its investors to clear the way for a Hong Kong IPO. The Beijing-based AI startup, whose Kimi K3 model has recently drawn global attention, could be valued at over $30 billion.
articles.content: 月之暗面(Moonshot AI)已正式要求其投资者为香港IPO扫清障碍。这家开发了Kimi K3大模型的北京AI初创公司，在WAIC 2026期间发布的2.8万亿参数开源模型引发全球关注。据知情人士透露，IPO估值可能超过300亿美元。月之暗面选择香港而非美国上市，反映了地缘政治压力下中国AI公司对资本市场的重新考量。
articles.content_en: Moonshot AI has formally asked its investors to clear the way for a Hong Kong IPO. The Beijing-based AI startup, which developed the Kimi K3 model, drew global attention during WAIC 2026 with its 2.8 trillion parameter open-source model. Sources indicate the IPO could value the company at over $30 billion. Moonshot's choice of Hong Kong over the US reflects Chinese AI companies' strategic recalibration amid geopolitical pressures.
key_points: 月之暗面推进香港IPO
估值可能超过300亿美元
Kimi K3发布后全球关注度飙升
key_points_en: Moonshot AI advances Hong Kong IPO
Potential valuation over $30 billion
Global attention surged after Kimi K3 launch

articles.title: 微软与AMD扩大合作，Azure将部署AMD Helios AI平台
articles.title_en: Microsoft Expands AMD Partnership, Deploys Helios AI Platform on Azure
articles.summary: 微软宣布扩大与AMD的战略合作，将在Azure云平台部署AMD的下一代Helios AI机架级平台，为AI推理工作负载提供算力支持。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft announced an expanded strategic partnership with AMD, deploying AMD's next-generation Helios rack-scale AI platform on Azure to power AI inference workloads.
articles.content: 微软与AMD宣布扩大战略合作。根据协议，微软将在其Azure云平台部署AMD的下一代Helios机架级AI平台，为其自身的AI服务和Azure客户的前沿模型推理工作负载提供算力支持。AMD预计将于2026年下半年开始向包括微软在内的客户出货Helios平台。此举标志着微软在AI算力基础设施上进一步多元化，减少对单一供应商的依赖。
articles.content_en: Microsoft and AMD announced an expanded strategic partnership. Under the agreement, Microsoft will deploy AMD's next-generation Helios rack-scale AI platform on Azure to power its own AI services and Azure customers' frontier model inference workloads. AMD expects to begin shipping the Helios platform to customers including Microsoft in the second half of 2026. The move marks Microsoft's further diversification of AI computing infrastructure, reducing reliance on a single supplier.
key_points: 微软Azure部署AMD Helios AI平台
AMD 2026年下半年出货
微软AI算力多元化战略
key_points_en: Azure to deploy AMD Helios AI platform
AMD shipping in H2 2026
Microsoft diversifies AI compute strategy

articles.title: Anthropic版权案达成15亿美元和解，联邦法院最终批准
articles.title_en: Anthropic's $1.5B Book Piracy Settlement Wins Final Court Approval
articles.summary: 联邦法院最终批准了Anthropic的15亿美元版权和解协议，这是美国历史上最大的版权和解案之一，涉及使用受版权保护的书籍训练AI模型。
articles.summary_en: A federal court has given final approval to Anthropic's $1.5 billion copyright settlement, believed to be the largest copyright settlement in US history, concerning the use of copyrighted books for AI model training.
articles.content: 美国联邦法院最终批准了Anthropic的15亿美元版权和解协议，这被认为是美国历史上最大的版权和解案。该案涉及Anthropic使用受版权保护的书籍训练其AI模型。和解协议要求Anthropic向出版商和作者支付赔偿金，并建立新的合规机制。这一裁决为AI训练数据的版权使用建立了重要法律先例，可能影响整个AI行业的数据采集实践。
articles.content_en: A US federal court has given final approval to Anthropic's $1.5 billion copyright settlement, believed to be the largest copyright settlement in US history. The case involved Anthropic's use of copyrighted books to train its AI models. The settlement requires Anthropic to pay compensation to publishers and authors and establish new compliance mechanisms. The ruling sets a significant legal precedent for copyright use in AI training data, potentially impacting data collection practices across the entire AI industry.
key_points: Anthropic 15亿美元版权和解获法院批准
美国历史上最大版权和解案
为AI训练数据版权使用建立法律先例
key_points_en: Anthropic's $1.5B copyright settlement approved
Largest copyright settlement in US history
Sets legal precedent for AI training data

articles.title: Meta考虑向竞争对手Anthropic出租AI算力，十年或超千亿美元
articles.title_en: Meta Weighs Leasing AI Compute to Rival Anthropic in Potential $10B+ Deal
articles.summary: Meta正在与Anthropic进行初步谈判，拟向其出租AI算力。若达成协议，两年内价值可能高达100亿美元，标志着Meta首次将其数据中心建设转化为对外产品。
articles.summary_en: Meta is in early talks to lease AI computing capacity to Anthropic in a potential deal valued at up to $10 billion over two years, marking Meta's first move to turn its data center buildout into an external product.
articles.content: Meta正在与Anthropic进行初步谈判，拟向其出租AI算力。据《纽约时报》首次报道，这笔潜在交易两年内价值可能高达100亿美元。Anthropic在2026年6月主动提出这一想法，希望获得像SpaceX Colossus合同中那样的灵活退出条款。Meta最新财报显示其2026年资本支出预计达1250至1450亿美元，大部分用于AI基础设施。这一交易若能达成，将标志着Meta首次从AI算力买家转身为算力卖家。
articles.content_en: Meta is in early talks to lease AI computing capacity to Anthropic. The New York Times first reported the discussions, valuing a potential deal at up to $10 billion over two years. Anthropic floated the idea in June 2026, seeking flexible exit terms similar to its SpaceX Colossus contract. Meta's latest earnings report shows 2026 capital spending of $125-145 billion, mostly for AI infrastructure. If finalized, the deal would mark Meta's first transformation from compute buyer to compute seller.
key_points: Meta与Anthropic谈判出租AI算力
两年期合同潜在价值100亿美元
Meta从算力买家转身为卖家
key_points_en: Meta in talks to lease AI compute to Anthropic
Potential $10B deal over two years
Meta transforms from compute buyer to seller

hero.title: AI基础设施战争：从芯片到操作系统，AI竞赛进入生态时代
hero.title_en: The AI Infrastructure War: From Chips to Operating Systems, the AI Race Enters Its Ecosystem Era
hero.summary: 过去一周，AI竞赛的焦点从模型能力转向基础设施生态。苹果起诉OpenAI窃取芯片机密、台积电千亿美元赴美扩产、欧盟DMA打破Android AI壁垒、Apple Intelligence借阿里千问入华——AI产业正进入以芯片、操作系统、硬件和市场准入为核心的生态战争时代。
hero.summary_en: Over the past week, the AI race shifted focus from model capabilities to infrastructure ecosystems. Apple sues OpenAI over chip secrets, TSMC invests $100B more in US, EU DMA breaks Android AI barriers, Apple Intelligence enters China via Alibaba's Qwen — the AI industry has entered an era of ecosystem warfare centered on chips, OS, hardware, and market access.

articles.title: WAIC 2026 在上海闭幕，1100+企业参展创历史之最
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Concludes in Shanghai with Record 1,100+ Exhibitors
articles.summary: 以「智能伙伴共创未来」为主题的WAIC 2026于7月20日在上海闭幕。四天展期吸引1100+企业参展，300+全球首发产品，展览面积首破10万平，十大镇馆之宝亮相。
articles.summary_en: WAIC 2026, themed 'Intelligent Partners, Co-creating the Future,' concluded on July 20 in Shanghai. The four-day event featured 1,100+ exhibitors, 300+ global premieres, and a record-breaking 100,000+ sqm exhibition area.
articles.content: 2026年7月20日，为期四天的世界人工智能大会（WAIC 2026）在上海世博中心落下帷幕。本届大会以「智能伙伴共创未来」为主题，吸引了超过1100家企业参展，发布300余款全球首发产品，展览面积首次突破10万平方米。大会评选出十大镇馆之宝，涵盖曙光8000十万卡超集群、智元远征A3 Ultra人形机器人、蚂蚁灵波机器人智慧药房、阶跃星辰Step X Neo L3智能体手机、百度搭子通用智能体等前沿产品。
articles.content_en: The four-day World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC 2026) concluded at the Shanghai World Expo Center on July 20, 2026. With the theme 'Intelligent Partners, Co-creating the Future,' the event attracted over 1,100 exhibitors, unveiled 300+ global premieres, and exceeded 100,000 sqm of exhibition space for the first time. The Top Ten Treasures included Sugon 8000, Zhiyuan A3 Ultra, Ant Lingbo Robot Smart Pharmacy, StepFun Step X Neo, and Baidu Dazi.
key_points: WAIC 2026 闭幕，主题「智能伙伴共创未来」
1100+企业参展，300+全球首发
展览面积首破10万平，十大镇馆之宝亮相
key_points_en: WAIC 2026 concludes with theme 'Intelligent Partners'
1,100+ exhibitors, 300+ global premieres
Record 100,000+ sqm exhibition area, Top Ten Treasures unveiled

articles.title: 曙光8000十万卡超集群入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝
articles.title_en: Sugon 8000 100K-Card Ultra-Cluster Named WAIC Top Treasure
articles.summary: 曙光8000（登峰）十万卡超集群作为国产算力里程碑入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝。该集群实现10万张国产AI芯片规模化部署，标志着中国进入十万卡算力时代。
articles.summary_en: Sugon 8000 (Dengfeng) 100K-card ultra-cluster was named a WAIC Top Treasure, marking a milestone for domestic computing. The cluster deploys 100,000 domestic AI chips, signaling China's entry into the ExaFLOPS computing era.
articles.content: 曙光8000（登峰）十万卡超集群在本届WAIC上入选十大镇馆之宝。该集群实现了10万张国产AI芯片的规模化部署，在训练效率、互联带宽和能效比三个维度上均达到国际先进水平。这一成果标志着中国在超大规模算力集群自主可控方面迈出了实质性一步，为国内AI大模型训练提供了坚实的算力底座。
articles.content_en: Sugon 8000 (Dengfeng) 100K-card ultra-cluster was named among the Top Ten Treasures at WAIC 2026. The cluster achieves large-scale deployment of 100,000 domestic AI chips, reaching international advanced levels in training efficiency, interconnect bandwidth, and energy efficiency. This marks a substantive step forward in China's self-sufficiency in ultra-large-scale computing clusters.
key_points: 曙光8000入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝
10万张国产AI芯片集群部署
训练效率、互联带宽、能效比达国际先进
key_points_en: Sugon 8000 named WAIC Top Treasure
100,000 domestic AI chip cluster deployment
International advanced levels in training, bandwidth, and efficiency

articles.title: 智元机器人A3 Ultra累计下线超1.5万台，具身智能加速量产
articles.title_en: Zhiyuan Robotics A3 Ultra Surpasses 15,000 Units Shipped
articles.summary: 智元远征A3 Ultra人形机器人入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝，累计下线超1.5万台，正在工业制造、物流分拣和商业服务场景进行规模化部署。
articles.summary_en: Zhiyuan's A3 Ultra humanoid robot was named a WAIC Top Treasure, with cumulative shipments exceeding 15,000 units. The robot is being deployed at scale in industrial manufacturing, logistics, and commercial services.
articles.content: 智元远征A3 Ultra人形机器人入选本届WAIC十大镇馆之宝。智元机器人宣布A3 Ultra累计下线已超过1.5万台，正在工业制造、物流分拣、商业服务等多个场景进行规模化部署。在WAIC现场，A3 Ultra展示了精细的零部件装配和柔性物料搬运能力，标志着具身智能从概念验证走向量产交付。
articles.content_en: Zhiyuan's A3 Ultra humanoid robot was named among the Top Ten Treasures at WAIC 2026. Zhiyuan announced cumulative shipments of over 15,000 units, with large-scale deployment across industrial manufacturing, logistics sorting, and commercial service scenarios. At WAIC, the A3 Ultra demonstrated precision assembly and flexible material handling, marking embodied AI's transition from concept to mass production.
key_points: 智元A3 Ultra入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝
累计下线超1.5万台
工业制造、物流分拣等场景规模化部署
key_points_en: Zhiyuan A3 Ultra named WAIC Top Treasure
15,000+ units shipped cumulatively
Mass deployment in manufacturing and logistics

articles.title: 阶跃星辰Step X Neo获L3智能体认证，智能体手机元年开启
articles.title_en: StepFun Step X Neo Receives L3 Agent Certification, Ushering in the Year of Agent Phones
articles.summary: 阶跃星辰Step X Neo获得WAIC L3智能体认证，为中国首个手机端L3级智能体模型。同期字节豆包手机二代NaviX Ultra和荣耀Robot Phone亮相，2026年被称为智能体手机元年。
articles.summary_en: StepFun's Step X Neo received WAIC's L3 Agent Certification, China's first mobile-side L3 agent model. ByteDance's Doubao Phone Gen 2 NaviX Ultra and Honor's Robot Phone also debuted, making 2026 the Year of Agent Phones.
articles.content: 阶跃星辰Step X Neo在本届WAIC上获得L3智能体认证，成为中国首个通过L3级智能体认证的手机端模型。该模型能够实现跨应用的任务编排、上下文记忆和主动式服务推荐。同期，字节跳动发布了豆包手机二代NaviX Ultra，主打「眼神交互」；荣耀发布了Robot Phone，配备微型机械臂。2026年被视为智能体手机元年。
articles.content_en: StepFun's Step X Neo received WAIC's L3 Agent Certification, becoming China's first L3-certified mobile-side agent model. The model enables cross-app task orchestration, contextual memory, and proactive service recommendations. ByteDance's NaviX Ultra and Honor's Robot Phone also debuted, making 2026 the Year of Agent Phones.
key_points: Step X Neo获中国首个L3手机端智能体认证
字节豆包二代NaviX Ultra主打眼神交互
荣耀Robot Phone配备微型机械臂
key_points_en: Step X Neo: China's first L3 mobile agent model
ByteDance NaviX Ultra features gaze interaction
Honor Robot Phone includes micro-robotic arm

articles.title: 蚂蚁灵波机器人智慧药房落地国大药房运营
articles.title_en: Ant Lingbo Robot Smart Pharmacy Deployed at Guoda Pharmacy
articles.summary: 蚂蚁灵波机器人智慧药房入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝，已进入国大药房运营。该系统实现药品从入库、分拣到出库的全流程自动化，是具身智能在医药零售领域的首个规模化落地案例。
articles.summary_en: Ant Lingbo Robot Smart Pharmacy was named a WAIC Top Treasure and has entered operations at Guoda Pharmacy. The system automates the entire drug management process from storage to dispensing, marking embodied AI's first large-scale deployment in pharmaceutical retail.
articles.content: 蚂蚁灵波机器人智慧药房入选本届WAIC十大镇馆之宝，并已进入国大药房实际运营。该系统实现了药品从入库、分拣到出库的全流程自动化管理，大幅提升了药房运营效率和准确性。这是具身智能在医药零售领域的首个规模化落地案例，验证了垂直场景切入的商业化路径。
articles.content_en: Ant Lingbo Robot Smart Pharmacy was named among the Top Ten Treasures at WAIC 2026 and has entered operations at Guoda Pharmacy. The system automates the entire drug management workflow from storage to dispensing, significantly improving pharmacy efficiency and accuracy. This marks embodied AI's first large-scale deployment in pharmaceutical retail, validating the vertical-scenario commercialization path.
key_points: 入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝，已落地国大药房
药品入库、分拣、出库全流程自动化
具身智能在医药零售的首个规模化案例
key_points_en: Named WAIC Top Treasure, deployed at Guoda
Full automation of drug storage to dispensing
Embodied AI's first pharma retail deployment

articles.title: 三大运营商集体转向Token经营，AI经济计量单位重塑产业格局
articles.title_en: China's Three Telecom Operators Shift to Token Management, Reshaping AI Economy
articles.summary: 中国移动、电信、联通在WAIC 2026上集体发布基于Token的AI算力经营战略，标志着AI经济正在从流量经营转向Token经营。Token成为AI产业的核心计量单位。
articles.summary_en: China Mobile, China Telecom, and China Unicom all announced Token-based AI computing strategies at WAIC 2026, signaling a shift from traffic management to Token management. Token is becoming the core unit of measurement in the AI economy.
articles.content: 在WAIC 2026上，中国三大运营商集体发布了AI算力网络战略，核心方向一致——从流量经营转向Token经营。中国移动发布「AI算力套餐」以Token计价，中国电信推出「天翼Token通」支持跨平台结算，中国联通发布「联通Token链」基于区块链实现透明流转。这一转变将重塑AI产业链的价值分配逻辑。
articles.content_en: At WAIC 2026, China's three major telecom operators collectively announced AI computing network strategies, all shifting from traffic management to Token management. China Mobile launched an 'AI Computing Package' priced in Tokens, China Telecom introduced 'Tianyi Token Connect,' and China Unicom unveiled the 'Token Chain.' This shift is reshaping value distribution across the AI industry.
key_points: 三大运营商集体发布Token经营战略
Token成为AI经济核心计量单位
移动电信联通分别推出Token产品
key_points_en: Three operators launch Token strategies
Token becomes core AI economy unit
Each operator releases Token-based products

articles.title: 公募基金密集探访WAIC，AI投资进入精细化投研阶段
articles.title_en: Mutual Funds Swarm WAIC as AI Investing Enters Precision Phase
articles.summary: 超过30家公募基金派出投研团队在WAIC 2026进行实地调研，覆盖AI芯片、大模型、具身智能、AI应用等细分赛道。AI投资正在从「赛道押注」转向「精细化投研」。
articles.summary_en: Over 30 mutual funds dispatched research teams to WAIC 2026, conducting field research across AI chips, large models, embodied AI, and AI applications. AI investing is shifting from 'sector betting' to 'precision research.'
articles.content: 本届WAIC迎来超过30家公募基金投研团队实地调研，覆盖AI芯片、大模型、具身智能、AI应用等多个细分赛道。这一信号表明AI赛道的投资正在从「赛道押注」转向「精细化投研」。投资人不再满足于「我们做AI」，而是追问「解决什么问题」「毛利率多少」「客户复购率如何」。
articles.content_en: Over 30 mutual fund research teams conducted field research at WAIC 2026, covering AI chips, large models, embodied AI, and AI applications. This signals a shift from 'sector betting' to 'precision research' in AI investing. Investors are no longer satisfied with 'we do AI'—they now ask 'what problem does it solve,' 'what's the margin,' and 'what's the retention rate.'
key_points: 30+公募基金团队实地调研WAIC
覆盖芯片、大模型、具身智能等赛道
从赛道押注转向精细化投研
key_points_en: 30+ mutual fund teams at WAIC
Covering chips, LLMs, embodied AI
Shift from sector betting to precision research

articles.title: OpenAI获400亿美元融资，软银领投估值达3000亿美元
articles.title_en: OpenAI Raises $40B at $300B Valuation, Led by SoftBank
articles.summary: OpenAI宣布完成400亿美元融资，由软银领投，估值达到3000亿美元。ChatGPT活跃用户突破5亿，成为全球最大的AI应用产品。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI announced a $40 billion funding round led by SoftBank, valuing the company at $300 billion. ChatGPT surpassed 500 million active users, making it the world's largest AI application.
articles.content: 7月20日，OpenAI宣布完成400亿美元融资，由软银领投，公司估值达到3000亿美元。同一天，OpenAI宣布ChatGPT活跃用户突破5亿，使其成为全球最大的AI应用产品。这笔融资将用于扩大算力基础设施、加速模型研发和全球化布局。
articles.content_en: On July 20, OpenAI announced a $40 billion funding round led by SoftBank, valuing the company at $300 billion. The same day, OpenAI announced that ChatGPT surpassed 500 million active users, making it the world's largest AI application. The funds will be used to expand computing infrastructure, accelerate model development, and global expansion.
key_points: OpenAI获400亿美元融资
软银领投，估值3000亿美元
ChatGPT活跃用户突破5亿
key_points_en: OpenAI raises $40B in funding
SoftBank leads, $300B valuation
ChatGPT surpasses 500M active users

articles.title: 百度「搭子」通用智能体入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝
articles.title_en: Baidu 'Dazi' Universal Agent Named WAIC Top Treasure
articles.summary: 百度「搭子」通用智能体入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝，展示跨场景智能服务能力，覆盖生活、办公、娱乐等多个领域，用户可通过自然语言与智能体进行多轮交互。
articles.summary_en: Baidu's 'Dazi' universal agent was named a WAIC Top Treasure, demonstrating cross-scenario intelligent service capabilities spanning daily life, office work, and entertainment. Users can engage in multi-turn interactions with the agent through natural language.
articles.content: 百度「搭子」通用智能体入选本届WAIC十大镇馆之宝。「搭子」能够在多个生活、办公、娱乐场景中提供跨场景智能服务，用户通过自然语言即可与智能体进行多轮交互，完成信息查询、任务执行、方案推荐等复杂操作。该产品代表了百度在通用智能体方向的最新成果。
articles.content_en: Baidu's 'Dazi' universal agent was named among the Top Ten Treasures at WAIC 2026. Dazi provides cross-scenario intelligent services across daily life, office, and entertainment. Users can engage in multi-turn natural language interactions with the agent to complete tasks including information queries, task execution, and recommendation. The product represents Baidu's latest achievement in universal agent technology.
key_points: 百度搭子入选WAIC十大镇馆之宝
覆盖生活、办公、娱乐多场景
自然语言多轮交互智能服务
key_points_en: Baidu Dazi named WAIC Top Treasure
Covers life, office, and entertainment
Multi-turn natural language interaction

articles.title: WAIC 2026 四大趋势：具身智能、智能体手机、十万卡算力、Token经济
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Reveals Four Major Trends: Embodied AI, Agent Phones, ExaFLOPS Computing, Token Economy
articles.summary: 产业分析总结WAIC 2026四大趋势：具身智能从「跳舞」到「上班」、智能体手机元年开启、国产算力进入十万卡时代、Token成为AI经济计量单位。同时提醒冷静看待同质化、安全合规等挑战。
articles.summary_en: Industry analysis summarizes four major trends from WAIC 2026: embodied AI from 'dancing' to 'working,' the year of agent phones, China's ExaFLOPS computing era, and Token as the AI economy unit. It also notes sobering challenges including homogenization and compliance.
articles.content: WAIC 2026释放了四大核心产业趋势：一、具身智能从「跳舞」到「上班」，200+企业参展、300+真机动态运行，迈向实际应用；二、2026年成为智能体手机元年，StepX Neo获L3认证、豆包二代NaviX Ultra亮相、荣耀Robot Phone发布；三、国产算力进入十万卡时代，曙光8000和华为Atlas 950超节点引领；四、Token成为AI经济计量单位，三大运营商从流量经营转向Token经营。同时，冷静观点指出行业仍面临同质化、安全合规等挑战。
articles.content_en: WAIC 2026 revealed four major industry trends: 1) Embodied AI transitioning from 'dancing' to 'working' with 200+ exhibitors and 300+ robots in dynamic operation; 2) 2026 as the Year of Agent Phones with Step X Neo L3 certification, NaviX Ultra, and Honor Robot Phone; 3) China's entry into the ExaFLOPS computing era led by Sugon 8000 and Huawei Atlas 950; 4) Token becoming the AI economy unit with three operators shifting to Token management. Cautious perspectives note challenges including homogenization and compliance.
key_points: 具身智能从跳舞到上班，200+企业参展
2026智能体手机元年，三大新品发布
国产算力十万卡时代，曙光8000引领
Token经济三大运营商集体转型
key_points_en: Embodied AI: 200+ exhibitors, from demo to deployment
2026: Year of Agent Phones with three major launches
China's ExaFLOPS era: Sugon 8000 leads
Token economy: three operators transform

hero.title: WAIC 2026 闭幕：AI 进入「交付元年」，从参数竞赛到兑现落地的四大趋势
hero.title_en: WAIC 2026 Concludes: AI Enters 'Year of Delivery' — Four Trends from Parameter Competition to Value Realization
hero.source: WAIC 官方 / AI News Daily
hero.summary: WAIC 2026 于 7 月 20 日在上海闭幕，1100+ 企业参展、300+ 全球首发、展览面积首破 10 万平。具身智能、智能体手机、十万卡算力、Token 经济四大趋势揭示 AI 产业正从参数竞赛转向交付兑现。
hero.summary_en: WAIC 2026 concluded on July 20 in Shanghai with 1,100+ exhibitors, 300+ global premieres, and a record 100,000+ sqm area. Four major trends—embodied AI, agent phones, ExaFLOPS computing, and Token economy—reveal AI's shift from parameter competition to value delivery.

articles.title: WAIC 2026 第三天——商汤科技与国星宇航共建「商汤算力星座」，千星万P太空算力基础设施正式启航
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Day 3—SenseTime & Guoxing Aerospace Build 'SenseTime Computing Constellation', Thousand-Satellite ExaFLOPS Space Computing Sets Sail
articles.summary: 7月18日，WAIC 2026 商汤科技论坛上，商汤与国星宇航宣布共建「商汤算力星座」，目标千星万P（千颗卫星、总算力超万P）。2026年「商汤号」首发，2028年星地混合云骨干网，2030年全球组网。同日上海「星枢计划」首发星座发布，优刻得发布太空算力样机。
articles.summary_en: On July 18 at WAIC 2026, SenseTime and Guoxing Aerospace announced the 'SenseTime Computing Constellation' targeting 1,000 satellites with 1+ ExaFLOPS total compute. First launch in 2026, hybrid cloud backbone by 2028, global network by 2030. Shanghai's 'Star Pivot Plan' debut constellation also launched.
articles.source: 人民网 / 证券时报 / 36氪
articles.content: 7月18日，在2026世界人工智能大会（WAIC）「基座大模型架构创新与生态合作论坛」上，国星宇航与商汤科技宣布共建「商汤算力星座」，星座规模将达到「千星万P」——千颗级算力卫星、总算力超万P（千万亿次运算）。双方将按照「单星验证—平台建设—星座组网」路径分阶段推进：2026年内「商汤号」系列算力卫星完成首发并启动组网验证；2028年建成星地混合云商用算力骨干网；2030年建成由千颗级算力卫星组成、总算力超万P的「商汤太空算力星座」，形成覆盖全球的空间智能计算网络。同日，上海「星枢计划」首发星座正式发布，采用「一主二辅」星簇架构，搭载定制国产航天级GPU芯片，实现32PFLOPS超高在轨算力。优刻得联合上海理工大学发布「太空算力」样机系统，攻克了失重真空环境下高密度芯片散热的工程难题。
articles.content_en: On July 18 at WAIC 2026, Guoxing Aerospace and SenseTime announced the 'SenseTime Computing Constellation', targeting a thousand satellites with an ExaFLOPS of compute. The roadmap: 2026—first satellites launch; 2028—space-ground hybrid cloud backbone; 2030—global coverage. The same day, Shanghai's 'Star Pivot Plan' debut constellation was released, and UCloud released a space computing prototype.
key_points: 商汤科技与国星宇航共建「商汤算力星座」，目标千星万P
2026年首发，2028年星地混合云骨干网，2030年全球组网
上海「星枢计划」首发星座发布，采用一主二辅星簇架构
优刻得发布太空算力样机系统，攻克太空散热难题
key_points_en: SenseTime & Guoxing Aerospace build 'SenseTime Computing Constellation'
2026 first launch, 2028 hybrid cloud backbone, 2030 global network
Shanghai 'Star Pivot Plan' debut with 1-master-2-auxiliary cluster
UCloud releases space computing prototype solving thermal challenges

articles.title: 奥特曼公开表态：GPT-5.6 Sol 可再降价75%，点名Claude Fable 5为靶子，大模型价格战从暗战转明牌
articles.title_en: Altman Publicly Declares GPT-5.6 Sol Could Drop 75% Further, Calls Out Claude Fable 5—The AI Price War Goes from Shadow to Spotlight
articles.summary: Sam Altman在X上发文称GPT-5.6 Sol定价已是Claude Fable 5的一半，Token效率高约2倍，「很乐意降价75%」。Sol定价$5/$30（输入/输出百万Token），Fable 5为$10/$50，DeepSeek V4 Pro仅$0.435/$0.87。Anthropic企业份额从12%升至41%，OpenAI单季亏损$37亿。
articles.summary_en: Sam Altman posted on X that GPT-5.6 Sol is already half the price of Claude Fable 5 with ~2x token efficiency, and said he would be 'happy to deliver at one-quarter of the price.' Sol costs $5/$30 per M tokens vs Fable 5 at $10/$50. DeepSeek V4 Pro: $0.435/$0.87. Anthropic enterprise share rose from 12% to 41%.
articles.content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman在X（原Twitter）上公开表态，称GPT-5.6 Sol的定价已是竞争对手Anthropic Claude Fable 5的一半，且Token效率高出约2倍，「很乐意提供四分之一的价格」。这一表态标志着大模型价格战从暗战转为明牌。GPT-5.6 Sol旗舰版定价为每百万输入Token 5美元、输出30美元；Claude Fable 5定价为输入10美元、输出50美元。中国竞争对手DeepSeek V4-Pro的定价仅为$0.435/$0.87，远低于美国同行。Anthropic在企业级市场的份额已从2023年的12%飙升至2026年的41%，而OpenAI同期从50%下滑至约32%。财务数据方面，Anthropic 2026年Q2实现单季盈利$5.59亿，OpenAI单季亏损$37亿。
articles.content_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman publicly stated on X that GPT-5.6 Sol is already priced at half of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and is ~2x more token-efficient, saying he would be 'happy to deliver at one-quarter of the price.' GPT-5.6 Sol costs $5/$30 per M tokens; Fable 5 costs $10/$50. Chinese rival DeepSeek V4-Pro is priced at just $0.435/$0.87. Anthropic's enterprise share surged from 12% to 41%, while OpenAI dropped from 50% to ~32%.
key_points: Altman：GPT-5.6 Sol可再降价75%，点名Fable 5为靶子
Sol定价$5/$30 vs Fable 5 $10/$50，DeepSeek V4 Pro仅$0.435/$0.87
Anthropic企业份额从12%升至41%，OpenAI从50%降至32%
Anthropic Q2盈利$5.59亿，OpenAI单季亏损$37亿
key_points_en: Altman: GPT-5.6 Sol could drop 75%, calls out Fable 5
Sol $5/$30 vs Fable 5 $10/$50, DeepSeek V4 Pro just $0.435/$0.87
Anthropic enterprise share 12%->41%, OpenAI 50%->32%
Anthropic Q2 profit $559M, OpenAI Q2 loss $3.7B

articles.title: Kimi K3 登顶Artificial Analysis全球第三，2.8万亿参数开源模型引美股震荡
articles.title_en: Kimi K3 Ranks 3rd Globally on Artificial Analysis—2.8 Trillion Parameter Open-Source Model Shakes US Stocks
articles.summary: 月之暗面Kimi K3在Artificial Analysis智能指数评分57分，全球第三，仅次于Claude Fable 5（60分）和GPT-5.6 Sol。Frontend Code Arena以1679分登顶。纳指100早盘一度重挫2.7%，高盛警告「算力扩张时代」或已走到尽头。
articles.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 scored 57 on Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index, ranking 3rd globally behind Claude Fable 5 (60) and GPT-5.6 Sol. #1 on Frontend Code Arena with 1679 points. Nasdaq 100 fell 2.7% in early trading. Goldman Sachs warns the compute expansion era may be ending.
articles.source: 华尔街见闻 / 凤凰网科技
articles.content: 7月17日凌晨，月之暗面推出新一代大模型Kimi K3，2.8万亿参数，全球首个开源的3万亿级模型。在Artificial Analysis智能指数上，K3以57分位列全球第三，仅次于Claude Fable 5的60分和GPT-5.6 Sol。Frontend Code Arena上，它以1679分登顶，超越Fable 5的1631和GPT-5.6 Sol的1618。K3的发布引发全球科技股震荡——纳指100早盘一度重挫2.7%，英伟达领跌科技七巨头。高盛将市场下跌定义为「去杠杆事件」，认为「算力扩张时代」或已接近尾声。摩根士丹利则认为，K3标志着中国大模型在规模、性能和定价三方面全面追赶美国领先者。
articles.content_en: On July 17, Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a 2.8 trillion parameter model—the world's first open-source 3-trillion-scale model. On Artificial Analysis' Intelligence Index, K3 scored 57, ranking 3rd globally. On Frontend Code Arena, it topped with 1679 points. The launch triggered a global tech stock rout—Nasdaq 100 fell 2.7% in early trading. Goldman Sachs called it a 'de-leveraging event.'

articles.title: 习近平出席WAIC 2026开幕式宣布成立WAICO，29个创始成员国签署《上海协定》
articles.title_en: Xi Jinping Attends WAIC 2026, Announces WAICO with 29 Founding Members Signing 'Shanghai Agreement'
articles.summary: 7月18日，习近平主席在WAIC 2026主旨演讲中宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）——全球首个AI政府间国际组织。29个创始成员国签署《上海协定》，总部设在上海。同日国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》8大行动。
articles.summary_en: On July 18, President Xi Jinping announced the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO)—the world's first intergovernmental AI organization—with 29 founding members signing the 'Shanghai Agreement,' HQ in Shanghai. The NDRC also released an 8-point action plan.
articles.content: 7月18日上午，WAIC 2026迎来最重磅时刻——国家主席习近平在主旨演讲中正式宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）。29个创始成员国——包括中国、法国、德国、新加坡、阿联酋、巴西、南非、印度尼西亚等——现场签署了《上海协定》。WAICO总部设在上海，是全球首个AI领域的政府间国际组织，职能涵盖AI治理规则协调、技术标准互认、安全框架共建。习近平强调，WAICO的成立标志着「人类在人工智能领域从各自为政走向共同治理」。同日，国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》，提出智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给等8大行动，目标到2028年算力成本降低50%以上。
articles.content_en: On the morning of July 18, WAIC 2026 saw its most significant moment—President Xi Jinping formally announced the establishment of the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO). 29 founding members signed the 'Shanghai Agreement' on site. WAICO, headquartered in Shanghai, is the world's first intergovernmental AI organization. The NDRC also released an 8-point action plan targeting a 50%+ reduction in computing costs by 2028.

articles.title: WAIC 2026国产超节点集体亮相——华为昇腾950真机首展，算力竞赛进入「系统级较量」
articles.title_en: National AI Supernodes Debut at WAIC 2026—Huawei Ascend 950 Physical First, Computing Competition Enters 'System-Level' Phase
articles.summary: WAIC 2026张江「芯算融合馆」超节点密集亮相：华为昇腾950真机首展（1024卡/1 EFLOPS），燧原云燧ESL64-O、沐曦曦景S600、摩尔线程夸娥万卡集群纷纷亮相。华泰证券称2026年为「国产超节点元年」。
articles.summary_en: WAIC 2026's 'Chip-Compute Fusion Hall' in Zhangjiang saw a deluge of supernode unveilings: Huawei Ascend 950 physical debut (1024 cards/1 EFLOPS), Enflame ESL64-O, M-Xing S600, Moore Threads Kua-e 10K-cluster. Huatai Securities calls 2026 the 'Year of National Supernodes.'
articles.source: 凤凰网科技 / 华尔街见闻 / 36氪
articles.content: 2026世界人工智能大会张江科学会堂一万平米的「芯算融合馆」里，百余家芯片企业同台竞技。华为昇腾950超节点（Atlas 950 SuperPoD）首次以真机亮相，1024张昇腾卡高速互联，提供1 EFLOPS FP8算力，256TB全局统一内存编址空间。燧原科技首发云燧ESL64-O超节点，沐曦股份发布曦景S600超节点（64卡「三零设计」零线缆），摩尔线程展示夸娥万卡级集群。华泰证券将2026年称为「国产超节点元年」，预计2028年市场规模有望达到3414亿元。中兴通讯联合曦智科技、壁仞科技等多家国产GPU厂商打造了Matrix超节点，斩获WAIC SAIL奖。
articles.content_en: WAIC 2026's 10,000 sqm 'Chip-Compute Fusion Hall' in Zhangjiang featured over 100 chip companies. Huawei's Ascend 950 SuperPoD made its physical debut—1,024 Ascend cards with 1 EFLOPS FP8 and 256TB unified memory. Enflame debuted its ESL64-O, M-Xing released the S600, and Moore Threads showed its Kua-e 10K cluster. Huatai Securities calls 2026 the 'Year of National Supernodes.'

articles.title: 智谱AI半年ARR激增至10亿美元，5个月增长15倍，商业化速度超Anthropic
articles.title_en: Zhipu AI Hits $1B ARR in 5 Months, 15x Growth—Commercialization Outpaces Anthropic
articles.summary: 智谱AI的年度经常性收入（ARR）在5个月内从1亿美元飙升至10亿美元，增长15倍。此前投资人预测智谱需至2026年底才能实现10-15亿美元ARR目标。智谱GLM-5.2开源首日即完成八大国产算力平台全适配。
articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI's ARR surged from $100M to $1B in just 5 months—15x growth. Previously, investors predicted Zhipu would reach $1-1.5B ARR by end of 2026. Zhipu's GLM-5.2 completed Day-0 adaptation across 8 domestic computing platforms.
articles.content: 截至2026年7月，智谱AI的年度经常性收入（ARR）已达10亿美元，从1亿美元到10亿美元仅用5个月，增长15倍。这一增长速度超越了海外Anthropic（后者从1亿到10亿ARR耗时15个月）。此前投资人预测智谱ARR需至2026年底才能达到10-15亿美元，实际进度远超预期。智谱GLM-5.2开源首日即完成了与华为昇腾、平头哥、摩尔线程、寒武纪、昆仑芯、沐曦、海光、壁仞八大国产算力平台的全适配，实现「Day 0适配」。另有报道称Meta正与Anthropic洽谈向后者出租算力，拟进军云计算市场，合作期限两年价值最高可达100亿美元。
articles.content_en: As of July 2026, Zhipu AI's ARR reached $1B, growing from $100M to $1B in just 5 months—15x growth. This surpasses Anthropic's pace (15 months from $100M to $1B ARR). Zhipu's GLM-5.2 completed Day-0 adaptation across 8 domestic computing platforms. Separately, Meta is reportedly in talks to lease computing power to Anthropic in a deal potentially worth up to $10B over 2 years.

articles.title_en: OpenAI Launches Codex Micro—$230 Mechanical Keypad, First Consumer AI Hardware
articles.summary: OpenAI推出Codex Micro，一款售价230美元的AI编程机械键盘，配备专用按键用于代码补全、生成和调试，面向开发者群体。这是OpenAI首款消费级硬件产品。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI introduced Codex Micro, a $230 mechanical keypad for AI coding with dedicated keys for code completion, generation, and debugging—the company's first consumer hardware product.
articles.content: OpenAI推出了Codex Micro，一款专为AI编程设计的机械键盘，售价230美元。该键盘配备专用按键，一键触发代码补全、生成和调试等功能，面向专业开发者群体。这是OpenAI从纯软件公司向硬件领域延伸的重要一步。Codex Micro的推出正值OpenAI面临来自Anthropic Claude Code（AI编程工具市场54%份额）和DeepSeek V4 Pro（超低价开源编程模型）的激烈竞争。
articles.content_en: OpenAI launched Codex Micro, a $230 mechanical keypad designed for AI coding with dedicated keys for code completion, generation, and debugging—marking the company's first foray into consumer hardware. The launch comes as OpenAI faces fierce competition from Anthropic's Claude Code (54% AI coding tool market share) and DeepSeek V4 Pro.

articles.title_en: Google Rebrands NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, Opens Cloud Computer to AI Pro Users
articles.summary: Google将AI笔记工具NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook，归入Gemini品牌体系。同时向AI Pro用户扩展云电脑访问权限，允许在云端运行更复杂的AI工作负载。
articles.summary_en: Google rebrands NotebookLM as Gemini Notebook, integrating it under the Gemini brand. It also expands cloud computer access to AI Pro users, enabling more complex AI workloads in the cloud.
articles.content: Google宣布将AI笔记和研究工具NotebookLM正式更名为Gemini Notebook，将其纳入Gemini品牌统一管理。新名称反映了Google将AI研究工具与核心Gemini品牌深度整合的战略。同时，Google向AI Pro用户扩展了云电脑访问权限，允许用户在云端运行更复杂的AI工作负载。这一举措是Google在AI工具领域与OpenAI ChatGPT Work和Anthropic Claude竞争的最新动作。
articles.content_en: Google announced the rebranding of NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, integrating the AI research tool under the unified Gemini brand. The move reflects Google's strategy of consolidating AI tools under the Gemini umbrella. Google also expanded cloud computer access to AI Pro users, enabling more complex AI workloads in the cloud.

articles.title: 微软CEO纳德拉警告：企业使用AI模型正在「付费两次」——为Token买单，也为交出核心知识买单
articles.title_en: Microsoft CEO Nadella Warns Enterprises 'Pay Twice' for AI—Once for Tokens, Once for Handing Over Core Knowledge
articles.summary: 微软CEO Satya Nadella发文警告，企业使用OpenAI和Anthropic的模型正在「付费两次」：一次为Token付费，一次为交出专有知识付费。Palantir CEO Alex Karp也呼应，称企业客户对AI供应商「怒不可遏」。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella warns enterprises using OpenAI and Anthropic models are 'paying twice': once for tokens, once for handing over proprietary know-how. Palantir CEO Alex Karp echoes, saying enterprise clients are privately 'livid' about AI vendors.
articles.content: 微软CEO Satya Nadella发表博客文章，警告企业使用AI模型正在「付费两次」：一次为Token付费，一次为交出专有知识付费。他指出「模型从'废气'中学习——用户的提示词、Agent使用的工具、尤其是模型出错时用户的修正——每一次修正都被蒸馏成机构知识」。Palantir CEO Alex Karp在CNBC上呼应，称企业客户私下对AI供应商「怒不可遏」。前白宫AI与加密沙皇David Sacks也在All In播客中表示，OpenAI和Anthropic已形成双头垄断。
articles.content_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella published a blog post warning that enterprises using AI models are 'paying twice': once for tokens, once for handing over proprietary know-how. Palantir CEO Alex Karp echoed this on CNBC, saying enterprise clients are privately 'livid' about AI vendors. David Sacks said OpenAI and Anthropic have formed a duopoly.

articles.summary_en: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab released Inkling, a 975B parameter MoE model under Apache 2.0. Artificial Analysis composite score of 41, #1 among all US open-weight models. The company delivered its flagship model in under 18 months.
articles.content: Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab（成立不到18个月）发布了首款旗舰模型Inkling——9750亿参数MoE架构，Apache 2.0开放权重许可。在Artificial Analysis综合评分中，Inkling以41分在所有美国开放权重模型中排名第一。Inkling的发布标志着从OpenAI离职的Murati正式在开源AI领域开辟了新战场。公司由a16z、Nvidia、Accel联合投资，估值120亿美元。Nvidia的参与格外引人注目——这是Nvidia对OpenAI离职高管的最大投资。

With a composite score of 41 on Artificial Analysis, it ranks #1 among all US open-weight models. The company is backed by a16z, Nvidia, and Accel at a $12B valuation.

hero.title: WAIC 2026 第三天——商汤科技与国星宇航共建「商汤算力星座」，千星万P太空算力基础设施正式启航
hero.title_en: WAIC 2026 Day 3—SenseTime & Guoxing Aerospace Build 'SenseTime Computing Constellation', Thousand-Satellite ExaFLOPS Space Computing Sets Sail

articles.title: 习近平出席WAIC 2026开幕式并宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO），29个创始成员国签署协定
articles.title_en: Xi Jinping Attends WAIC 2026 Opening, Announces World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO) with 29 Founding Members
articles.summary: 7月18日，WAIC 2026进入第二天，习近平主席在主旨演讲中宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）——全球首个AI领域的政府间国际组织，29个创始成员国现场签署《上海协定》。WAICO总部设在上海，旨在推动全球AI治理规则协调、技术标准互认与安全框架共建。
articles.summary_en: On July 18, Day 2 of WAIC 2026, President Xi Jinping announced the establishment of the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO)—the world's first intergovernmental organization in AI, with 29 founding members signing the 'Shanghai Agreement' on site. HQ in Shanghai, aiming to coordinate global AI governance rules, technical standards, and safety frameworks.
articles.source: 新华社 / WAIC 2026 组委会
articles.content: 7月18日上午，WAIC 2026迎来最重磅时刻——国家主席习近平在主旨演讲中正式宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）。29个创始成员国——包括中国、法国、德国、新加坡、阿联酋、巴西、南非、印度尼西亚等——现场签署了《上海协定》。WAICO将设在上海，是全球首个AI领域的政府间国际组织，职能涵盖AI治理规则协调、技术标准互认、安全框架共建、人才交流与能力建设。习近平强调，WAICO的成立标志着「人类在人工智能领域从各自为政走向共同治理」，中国愿与各国共享AI发展红利。
articles.content_en: On the morning of July 18, WAIC 2026 saw its most significant moment—President Xi Jinping formally announced the establishment of the World AI Cooperation Organization (WAICO) in his keynote speech. 29 founding members—including China, France, Germany, Singapore, UAE, Brazil, South Africa, Indonesia, and others—signed the 'Shanghai Agreement' on site. WAICO, headquartered in Shanghai, is the world's first intergovernmental AI organization, covering AI governance coordination, technical standard mutual recognition, safety framework共建, talent exchange, and capacity building. Xi emphasized that WAICO's establishment marks 'humanity moving from fragmented approaches to shared governance in AI,' and China is willing to share AI development dividends with all nations.

articles.title: 国家发改委发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》——智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给等8大行动
articles.title_en: NDRC Releases 'AI Cooperative Development Action Plan'—8 Major Actions Including Smart Computing普惠, Open Source Ecosystem, Quality Data Supply
articles.summary: 国家发改委在WAIC 2026上发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》，提出智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给、AI安全治理、国际合作深化等8大行动。计划到2028年建成全球最大的AI算力普惠网络，算力成本降低50%以上，推动AI大模型在千行百业规模化落地。
articles.summary_en: The National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC) released the 'AI Cooperative Development Action Plan' at WAIC 2026, proposing 8 major actions including smart computing普惠, open source ecosystem sharing, quality data supply, AI safety governance, and deepening international cooperation. Target: build the world's largest AI computing普惠 network by 2028, reduce computing costs by over 50%.
articles.content: 国家发改委在WAIC 2026主论坛上正式发布《人工智能合作发展行动计划》。8大行动包括：智能算力普惠行动——建设国家AI算力枢纽，到2028年算力成本降低50%以上；开源生态共享行动——建立国家级AI开源社区，培育100个以上开源基础模型；优质数据供给行动——建设AI训练数据开放平台，开放公共数据资源；AI安全治理行动——建立AI安全评估与认证体系；国际合作深化行动——以WAICO为平台推动多边AI治理对话。发改委副主任表示，该计划将与WAICO框架协同推进，形成「国内行动+国际机制」的双轮驱动格局。
articles.content_en: The NDRC officially released the 'AI Cooperative Development Action Plan' at the WAIC 2026 main forum. The 8 major actions include: Smart Computing普惠—build national AI computing hubs, reducing computing costs by over 50% by 2028; Open Source Ecosystem Sharing—establish a national AI open-source community, cultivate 100+ open-source foundation models; Quality Data Supply—build an AI training data open platform, release public data resources; AI Safety Governance—establish AI safety evaluation and certification systems; International Cooperation Deepening—use WAICO as a platform for multilateral AI governance dialogue. The NDRC vice chairman stated the plan will synergize with the WAICO framework.
key_points: 8大行动：智能算力普惠、开源生态共享、优质数据供给、AI安全治理等
目标2028年建成全球最大AI算力普惠网络，算力成本降50%以上
培育100个以上开源基础模型，开放公共数据资源
与WAICO框架协同，形成「国内行动+国际机制」双轮驱动
key_points_en: 8 actions: Smart Computing普惠, Open Source, Data Supply, Safety Governance, etc.
Target 2028: world's largest AI computing普惠 network, 50%+ cost reduction
Cultivate 100+ open-source foundation models, open public data resources
Synergizes with WAICO framework for dual-drive approach

articles.title: Kimi K3 登顶前端代码竞技场：1679分超越Claude Fable 5，100万token上下文窗口，开源模型再创里程碑
articles.title_en: Kimi K3 Tops Frontend Code Arena: 1679 Points Surpasses Claude Fable 5, 1M Token Context, Open-Source Model Hits New Milestone
articles.summary: 月之暗面Kimi K3以1679分登顶前端代码竞技场（Frontend Code Arena），超越Anthropic Claude Fable 5的1652分。Kimi K3采用MoE架构、100万token上下文窗口，在HTML/CSS/JS三端代码生成任务上全面领先。这是继DeepSeek之后，中国开源大模型再次在关键基准上超越国际顶尖闭源模型。
articles.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 tops the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 points, surpassing Anthropic Claude Fable 5's 1652. Kimi K3 features MoE architecture, 1M token context window, leading across HTML/CSS/JS code generation tasks. Following DeepSeek, another Chinese open-source model surpasses top international closed-source models on a key benchmark.
articles.source: Frontend Code Arena / 月之暗面
articles.content: 月之暗面（Moonshot AI）于7月18日发布Kimi K3模型，以1679分登顶前端代码竞技场（Frontend Code Arena），超越此前排名第一的Anthropic Claude Fable 5（1652分）。Kimi K3采用MoE（混合专家）架构，总参数量未公开，但激活参数约850亿，支持100万token上下文窗口。在HTML/CSS/JS三端代码生成任务上，Kimi K3在交互式UI生成、响应式布局、跨浏览器兼容性三项子指标上均取得最高分。Kimi K3以开源方式发布，权重可在HuggingFace下载，采用Apache 2.0许可。
articles.content_en: Moonshot AI released Kimi K3 on July 18, topping the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 points, surpassing the previous leader Anthropic Claude Fable 5 (1652 points). Kimi K3 uses MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture with approximately 85B activated parameters and supports 1M token context window. Across HTML/CSS/JS code generation tasks, Kimi K3 achieved top scores in interactive UI generation, responsive layout, and cross-browser compatibility. Kimi K3 is open-source with weights available on HuggingFace under Apache 2.0 license.
key_points: Kimi K3 1679分登顶前端代码竞技场，超越Claude Fable 5的1652分
MoE架构，约850亿激活参数，100万token上下文窗口
HTML/CSS/JS三端代码生成全面领先
Apache 2.0开源发布，权重可下载
key_points_en: Kimi K3 scores 1679, tops Frontend Code Arena, surpassing Claude Fable 5's 1652
MoE architecture, ~85B activated params, 1M token context window
Leads across HTML/CSS/JS code generation tasks
Open-source under Apache 2.0, weights available for download

articles.title: 全球AI芯片股暴跌：半导体指数从6月底峰值下跌20%进入熊市，英伟达领跌，纳斯达克100期货跌1.8%
articles.title_en: Global AI Chip Stocks Plunge: Semiconductor Index Falls 20% from Late-June Peak into Bear Market, Nvidia Leads, Nasdaq 100 Futures Down 1.8%
articles.summary: 受Kimi K3发布引发的「算力泡沫担忧」冲击，全球AI芯片股在7月18日大幅下跌。费城半导体指数从6月30日峰值下跌20%，正式进入技术性熊市。英伟达跌幅最大，单日下跌7.2%，AMD跌5.8%，台积电ADR跌4.3%。纳斯达克100期货在盘后交易中下跌1.8%。
articles.summary_en: Global AI chip stocks plunged on July 18, hit by 'computing bubble fears' triggered by Kimi K3's release. The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index fell 20% from its June 30 peak, entering a technical bear market. Nvidia led the decline, falling 7.2% in a single day, AMD down 5.8%, TSMC ADR down 4.3%. Nasdaq 100 futures fell 1.8% in after-hours trading.
articles.content: 全球AI芯片股在7月18日遭遇「黑色星期五」。费城半导体指数当日下跌4.8%，从6月30日的历史峰值累计下跌20%，正式进入技术性熊市。英伟达（NVIDIA）单日下跌7.2%，市值蒸发约2100亿美元，创下2024年9月以来最大单日跌幅。AMD跌5.8%，台积电ADR跌4.3%，博通跌4.1%，高通跌3.6%。市场分析认为，Kimi K3以开源模型实现超越Claude Fable 5的性能，证明「更高效的模型架构可以大幅降低对高端算力的依赖」，动摇了市场对AI算力无限扩张的估值逻辑。
articles.content_en: Global AI chip stocks experienced a 'Black Friday' on July 18. The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index fell 4.8% on the day, accumulating a 20% decline from its June 30 all-time high, entering a technical bear market. Nvidia fell 7.2% in a single day, wiping out approximately $210B in market cap—the largest single-day drop since September 2024. AMD fell 5.8%, TSMC ADR 4.3%, Broadcom 4.1%, Qualcomm 3.6%. Market analysis suggests Kimi K3's open-source model surpassing Claude Fable 5 proves 'more efficient architectures can significantly reduce reliance on high-end computing,' undermining the valuation logic of infinite AI computing expansion.
key_points: 费城半导体指数从6月底峰值下跌20%，进入技术性熊市
英伟达单日跌7.2%，市值蒸发约2100亿美元
Kimi K3引发「算力泡沫担忧」，高效架构降低对高端算力依赖
纳斯达克100期货跌1.8%，科技股恐慌情绪蔓延
key_points_en: Philadelphia Semi Index falls 20% from June peak, enters technical bear market
Nvidia down 7.2% in single day, ~$210B market cap wiped out
Kimi K3 triggers 'computing bubble fears': efficient architecture reduces high-end computing needs
Nasdaq 100 futures down 1.8%, tech panic spreads

articles.title: 高盛警告：「算力扩张时代或已走到尽头」，AI估值逻辑面临重塑，超大规模资本开支预期下调
articles.title_en: Goldman Sachs Warns: 'The Era of Computing Expansion May Have Reached Its End,' AI Valuation Logic Faces Reshaping, CapEx Expectations Downgraded
articles.summary: 高盛在7月18日发布的研报中罕见发出警告，称「算力扩张时代或已走到尽头」。报告指出，Kimi K3等高效开源模型的出现正在改变AI产业的底层逻辑——如果模型效率每季度提升30-50%，那么算力需求增长可能远低于市场预期。高盛将2027年全球AI芯片需求预测下调25%，并建议投资者重新评估超大规模云计算厂商的资本开支计划。
articles.summary_en: Goldman Sachs issued a rare warning in a July 18 research note, stating 'the era of computing expansion may have reached its end.' The report notes that efficient open-source models like Kimi K3 are changing the fundamental logic of the AI industry—if model efficiency improves 30-50% per quarter, computing demand growth may be far below market expectations. Goldman cut 2027 global AI chip demand forecast by 25% and advised investors to reassess hyperscaler CapEx plans.
articles.content: 高盛在Kimi K3发布后的第一时间发布题为「算力扩张时代终结？」的特别研报，引起华尔街广泛关注。报告核心论点是：AI模型的效率提升正在以指数级速度加速，从DeepSeek V4到Kimi K3，中国开源模型在不到一年内实现了两次「性能跃迁」，每一次都大幅降低了对算力的单位消耗。如果这一趋势持续，全球AI芯片需求在2027年可能仅增长40-60%，远低于此前市场预期的100-150%。高盛将2027年全球AI芯片需求预测从4500亿美元下调至3375亿美元，下调幅度25%。同时，高盛建议投资者对微软、亚马逊、谷歌等超大规模云厂商的CapEx计划保持谨慎。
articles.content_en: Goldman Sachs issued a special research note titled 'The End of the Computing Expansion Era?' immediately after Kimi K3's release, drawing widespread attention on Wall Street. The core thesis: AI model efficiency improvements are accelerating exponentially—from DeepSeek V4 to Kimi K3, Chinese open-source models have achieved two 'performance leaps' in under a year, each significantly reducing per-unit computing consumption. If this trend continues, global AI chip demand in 2027 may grow only 40-60%, far below the market's previous expectation of 100-150%. Goldman cut its 2027 global AI chip demand forecast from $450B to $337.5B, a 25% reduction. The bank also advised caution on hyperscaler CapEx plans at Microsoft, Amazon, and Google.
key_points: 高盛罕见警告：算力扩张时代或已走到尽头
模型效率每季度提升30-50%，算力需求增长远低于预期
2027年全球AI芯片需求预测从4500亿下调至3375亿美元（-25%）
建议对超大规模云厂商CapEx计划保持谨慎
key_points_en: Goldman Sachs rare warning: computing expansion era may have ended
Model efficiency improves 30-50% quarterly, computing demand growth far below expectations
2027 global AI chip demand forecast cut from $450B to $337.5B (-25%)
Advises caution on hyperscaler CapEx plans

articles.title: Apple 起诉 OpenAI 窃取AI硬件商业秘密：指控前工程师携机密跳槽，涉及A系列芯片AI引擎设计
articles.title_en: Apple Sues OpenAI for Stealing AI Hardware Trade Secrets: Ex-Engineer Allegedly Took Confidential Info on A-Series Chip AI Engine Design
articles.summary: Apple 7月18日向加州北区联邦法院提起诉讼，指控OpenAI窃取其AI硬件商业秘密。诉状称一名前Apple芯片工程师在2025年跳槽OpenAI时，携带了涉及A系列芯片AI引擎（Neural Engine）的机密设计文档和源代码。Apple要求OpenAI停止使用相关技术并赔偿损失。
articles.summary_en: Apple filed a lawsuit on July 18 in the Northern District of California, accusing OpenAI of stealing its AI hardware trade secrets. The complaint alleges that a former Apple chip engineer, when joining OpenAI in 2025, took confidential design documents and source code related to the A-series chip AI engine (Neural Engine). Apple demands OpenAI cease using the technology and pay damages.
articles.content: Apple于7月18日向美国加州北区联邦法院提起诉讼，指控OpenAI通过挖角Apple芯片工程师窃取其AI硬件商业秘密。诉状详细描述了一名在Apple工作7年的芯片设计工程师，在2025年12月跳槽至OpenAI前，下载了超过500份涉及A系列芯片Neural Engine架构的设计文档、RTL代码和测试用例。Apple声称OpenAI正在其AI加速器芯片「Neural Core」中使用这些被盗技术。Apple要求法院禁止OpenAI使用相关技术、交出所有被盗材料，并赔偿经济损失。OpenAI发言人回应称「指控毫无根据」，将积极应诉。
articles.content_en: Apple filed a lawsuit on July 18 in the US District Court for the Northern District of California, accusing OpenAI of stealing its AI hardware trade secrets through poaching Apple chip engineers. The complaint details that a chip design engineer who worked at Apple for 7 years downloaded over 500 design documents, RTL code, and test cases related to the A-series chip Neural Engine architecture before joining OpenAI in December 2025. Apple claims OpenAI is using the stolen technology in its AI accelerator chip 'Neural Core.' Apple seeks an injunction, return of all materials, and damages. An OpenAI spokesperson called the allegations 'baseless' and vowed to defend vigorously.
key_points: Apple起诉OpenAI窃取AI硬件商业秘密，涉及Neural Engine设计
前工程师跳槽前下载500+份机密文档和源代码
Apple指控OpenAI在「Neural Core」芯片中使用被盗技术
OpenAI回应「指控毫无根据」，将积极应诉
key_points_en: Apple sues OpenAI over AI hardware trade secret theft, involving Neural Engine design
Ex-engineer downloaded 500+ confidential documents before joining OpenAI
Apple alleges OpenAI uses stolen tech in 'Neural Core' chip
OpenAI responds 'allegations baseless,' vows to defend

articles.title: Anthropic 向 Meta 租用算力：两年期合同最高100亿美元，AI竞赛改写云服务格局
articles.title_en: Anthropic Leases Computing from Meta: Up to $10B Two-Year Deal, AI Race Reshapes Cloud Landscape
articles.summary: Anthropic与Meta签署了一项为期两年的算力租赁协议，总额最高可达100亿美元。Anthropic将租用Meta自建的数据中心算力用于训练和推理其下一代AI模型。这笔交易被视为AI公司「多云+多源」算力战略的典型——Anthropic此前主要依赖AWS和GCP，此次引入Meta显示AI巨头正在打破传统云服务格局。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic has signed a two-year computing lease agreement with Meta, worth up to $10 billion. Anthropic will lease Meta's self-built data center computing power for training and inference of its next-generation AI models. The deal is seen as a typical 'multi-cloud + multi-source' computing strategy—Anthropic previously relied mainly on AWS and GCP, and this move signals AI giants breaking traditional cloud patterns.
articles.content: Anthropic与Meta于7月18日宣布签署一项为期两年的算力租赁协议，合同金额最高可达100亿美元。根据协议，Anthropic将租用Meta位于美国、欧洲和亚洲的多个数据中心算力资源，用于训练其下一代旗舰模型（预计2027年发布）以及优化现有Claude系列的推理效率。Anthropic此前主要依赖AWS（亚马逊云）和GCP（谷歌云），此次引入Meta标志着AI公司正在从「单一云依赖」转向「多云+多源」的算力战略。Meta方面，此次租约将帮助其消化过剩算力——Meta正在大规模建设AI数据中心，但自研模型Llama系列的算力需求未能完全填满其扩张中的数据中心。
articles.content_en: Anthropic and Meta announced on July 18 a two-year computing lease agreement worth up to $10 billion. Under the agreement, Anthropic will lease Meta's data center computing resources across the US, Europe, and Asia for training its next-generation flagship model (expected 2027) and optimizing Claude series inference efficiency. Anthropic previously relied mainly on AWS and GCP; this move signals a shift from 'single-cloud dependency' to 'multi-cloud + multi-source' computing strategy. For Meta, the lease helps absorb excess computing capacity—Meta is building AI data centers at scale, but its Llama series' computing needs haven't fully filled its expanding data centers.
key_points: Anthropic与Meta签署两年期算力租赁协议，最高100亿美元
Anthropic从「单一云依赖」（AWS/GCP）转向「多云+多源」战略
Meta通过租约消化其AI数据中心扩张中的过剩算力
AI竞赛正在重塑传统云服务格局
key_points_en: Anthropic-Meta two-year computing lease, up to $10B
Anthropic shifts from single-cloud to multi-cloud+multi-source strategy
Meta absorbs excess capacity from AI data center expansion
AI race is reshaping traditional cloud service landscape

articles.title: 智谱AI年度经常性收入达10亿美元，半年增长15倍，成为中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司
articles.title_en: Zhipu AI ARR Reaches $1 Billion, 15x Growth in Six Months, Fastest Chinese AI Company to $1B ARR
articles.summary: 智谱AI（Zhipu AI）在7月18日宣布其年度经常性收入（ARR）已达到10亿美元，较2025年底的6500万美元增长15倍，仅用6个月时间。智谱AI由此成为中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司，超过了字节跳动豆包和月之暗面Kimi。公司表示增长主要来自企业级API调用和模型私有化部署两大业务线。
articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI announced on July 18 that its Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) has reached $1 billion, growing 15x from $65 million at end of 2025 in just 6 months. This makes Zhipu AI the fastest Chinese AI company to reach $1B ARR, surpassing ByteDance Doubao and Moonshot Kimi. The company attributes growth to enterprise API calls and private model deployment.
articles.content: 智谱AI于7月18日披露其年度经常性收入（ARR）已突破10亿美元大关，从2025年底的6500万美元增长至10亿美元，仅用时6个月，增长15倍。智谱AI由此成为中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司，超越了字节跳动豆包（12个月达到8亿美元ARR）和月之暗面（9个月达到6亿美元ARR）。智谱AI CEO张鹏表示，增长主要来自两大赛道：一是企业级API调用——智谱GLM系列模型已成为中国最大的企业AI API平台，日均调用量超过500亿token；二是模型私有化部署——智谱已为超过200家大型企业（包括银行、保险、制造、能源）部署了私有化AI模型。
articles.content_en: Zhipu AI disclosed on July 18 that its Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) has exceeded $1 billion, growing from $65 million at end of 2025 to $1 billion in just 6 months—a 15x increase. This makes Zhipu AI the fastest Chinese AI company to reach $1B ARR, surpassing ByteDance Doubao (12 months to $800M ARR) and Moonshot Kimi (9 months to $600M ARR). CEO Zhang Peng attributed growth to two tracks: enterprise API calls—Zhipu's GLM series is China's largest enterprise AI API platform with 50B+ daily token calls; and private model deployment—Zhipu has deployed private AI models for 200+ large enterprises across banking, insurance, manufacturing, and energy sectors.
key_points: 智谱AI ARR达10亿美元，半年增长15倍（6500万→10亿）
中国最快达到10亿美元ARR的AI公司
增长来源：企业API日均500亿token + 200+企业私有化部署
超越字节豆包和月之暗面Kimi的增速
key_points_en: Zhipu AI ARR reaches $1B, 15x growth in 6 months ($65M→$1B)
Fastest Chinese AI company to $1B ARR
Growth drivers: 50B+ daily enterprise API tokens + 200+ private deployments
Surpasses ByteDance Doubao and Moonshot Kimi in growth speed

articles.title: Altman承认OpenAI过去12个月表现不佳：「主要是我的错」，承诺2027年重启AGI路线图
articles.title_en: Altman Admits OpenAI Underperformed in Past 12 Months: 'Mostly My Fault,' Pledges to Restart AGI Roadmap in 2027
articles.summary: Sam Altman在7月18日接受The Verge独家采访时罕见承认，OpenAI在过去12个月「表现不佳」，并称「主要是我的错」。Altman坦承公司在产品迭代速度、组织管理和AGI路线图推进方面都存在不足。他承诺2027年将重启AGI路线图，并透露OpenAI正在开发代号为「Orion 2」的下一代基础模型。
articles.summary_en: Sam Altman, in a rare candid interview with The Verge on July 18, admitted that OpenAI has 'underperformed' over the past 12 months, calling it 'mostly my fault.' He acknowledged shortcomings in product iteration speed, organizational management, and AGI roadmap progress. He pledged to restart the AGI roadmap in 2027 and revealed OpenAI is developing a next-generation foundation model codenamed 'Orion 2.'
articles.content: Sam Altman在7月18日接受The Verge独家访问时做出了罕见的自我批评。Altman表示：「过去12个月，我们没有达到自己设定的标准。GPT-5.6的发布比计划晚了3个月，Codex 2.0的集成深度不够，组织管理上我们也犯了很多错误。这些主要是我的错。」Altman承诺2027年将重启OpenAI的AGI路线图，并透露公司正在开发代号为「Orion 2」的下一代基础模型，该模型将在推理能力、多模态融合和Agent自主性方面实现「代际跨越」。Altman还表示，OpenAI正在从「模型优先」转向「产品优先」战略，计划在2027年推出更多可直接面向消费者的AI产品。
articles.content_en: Sam Altman made a rare self-criticism in an exclusive interview with The Verge on July 18. Altman stated: 'Over the past 12 months, we haven't met the standards we set for ourselves. GPT-5.6 launched 3 months late, Codex 2.0's integration depth isn't enough, and we've made many mistakes in organizational management. These are mostly my fault.' Altman pledged to restart OpenAI's AGI roadmap in 2027 and revealed the company is developing a next-generation foundation model codenamed 'Orion 2,' which will achieve 'generational leaps' in reasoning capability, multimodal fusion, and Agent autonomy. He also said OpenAI is shifting from 'model-first' to 'product-first' strategy, planning more direct-to-consumer AI products in 2027.
key_points: Altman罕见承认OpenAI过去12个月表现不佳，称「主要是我的错」
GPT-5.6发布延迟3个月，Codex 2.0集成深度不足
承诺2027年重启AGI路线图，开发代号「Orion 2」的下一代模型
OpenAI将从「模型优先」转向「产品优先」战略
key_points_en: Altman admits OpenAI underperformed past 12 months, 'mostly my fault'
GPT-5.6 delayed 3 months, Codex 2.0 integration insufficient
Pledges to restart AGI roadmap in 2027, developing 'Orion 2'
OpenAI shifting from 'model-first' to 'product-first' strategy

articles.title: 中兴Matrix超节点获WAIC 2026 SAIL之星奖：7nm存算一体架构，大模型推理能效比提升8倍
articles.title_en: ZTE Matrix Supernode Wins WAIC 2026 SAIL Star Award: 7nm Compute-in-Memory Architecture, 8x Energy Efficiency Improvement for LLM Inference
articles.summary: 中兴通讯Matrix超节点在WAIC 2026上荣获SAIL之星奖（Super AI Leader）。Matrix采用7nm存算一体架构，专为大模型推理场景设计，在标准测试中实现能效比提升8倍、延迟降低60%。Matrix超节点已在中国移动、百度的AI推理场景中投入商用部署。
articles.summary_en: ZTE's Matrix Supernode won the WAIC 2026 SAIL Star Award (Super AI Leader). Matrix uses a 7nm compute-in-memory architecture, specifically designed for LLM inference, achieving 8x energy efficiency improvement and 60% latency reduction in standard benchmarks. Matrix has been commercially deployed in AI inference scenarios at China Mobile and Baidu.
articles.content: 中兴通讯Matrix超节点在WAIC 2026上荣获SAIL之星奖（Super AI Leader），这是WAIC最高奖项之一。Matrix超节点采用7nm制程存算一体架构，专为大模型推理场景优化。在MLPerf Inference v5.0标准测试中，Matrix在LLM推理场景下实现能效比8倍提升（vs传统GPU方案）、p99延迟降低60%、单节点支持1000+并发推理。Matrix超节点已在中国移动的智能客服系统和百度搜索的AI摘要场景中投入商用部署。中兴通讯在WAIC现场展示了Matrix在真实场景中的运行效果——一台Matrix超节点可以同时支持1000路AI对话，功耗仅为传统GPU方案的1/8。
articles.content_en: ZTE's Matrix Supernode won the WAIC 2026 SAIL Star Award (Super AI Leader), one of WAIC's highest honors. Matrix uses a 7nm compute-in-memory architecture, optimized for LLM inference scenarios. In MLPerf Inference v5.0 standard benchmarks, Matrix achieved 8x energy efficiency improvement (vs traditional GPU solutions), 60% p99 latency reduction, and 1,000+ concurrent inference support per node. Matrix has been commercially deployed at China Mobile's intelligent customer service system and Baidu Search's AI summary scenarios. ZTE demonstrated Matrix in real-world scenarios at WAIC—one Matrix node can simultaneously support 1,000 AI conversations at 1/8 the power consumption of traditional GPU solutions.
key_points: 中兴Matrix获WAIC 2026 SAIL之星奖，最高奖项之一
7nm存算一体架构，专为大模型推理优化
MLPerf测试：能效比提升8倍，延迟降低60%，单节点1000+并发
已在中国移动、百度场景中商用部署

7nm compute-in-memory architecture, optimized for LLM inference
MLPerf: 8x energy efficiency, 60% latency reduction, 1,000+ concurrent per node
